prompt: I want to add the mcp-builder skill from anthropic-skills. It mentions using FastMCP — does it depend on any other skills already in claudekit?

assertions.text: Greps mcp-builder/ for skill/agent references and reports findings
assertions.check: Response shows grep commands run on mcp-builder/ for skill or agent references

assertions.text: Checks scripts/ for Python imports to identify external package dependencies
assertions.check: Response inspects mcp-builder/scripts/ for import statements

assertions.text: Correctly identifies fastmcp/mcp as external Python packages (not claudekit skills)
assertions.check: Response classifies fastmcp or mcp as dependencies.external with type python_pkg or similar

assertions.text: Correctly concludes no inter-skill dependencies on existing claudekit skills
assertions.check: Response states dependencies.required skills is empty

assertions.text: Produces a dependencies section for SOURCE.yaml with correct external entry
assertions.check: Response shows a SOURCE.yaml snippet with external dependencies for fastmcp or mcp
